_inspectorSnowReport.Report: Sunday March 01 5:05 a.m. A weak storm passed through the canyon last night, bringing mixed precipitation. There is a slight chance of lingering flurries at higher elevations and a touch of drizzle down low this morning. Temperatures will start the day in the mid-30s and rise to the low 40s this afternoon under silvery skies. The springlike weather has left us with variable conditions. The snow may be wet or firm depending on time of day, slope aspect, and elevation. With 70+ open trails, you are sure to find terrain to your taste! More than 30 of our trails are groomed, and they’ve been loads of fun the last couple of days. Honeycomb gates will be open for adventure, conditions permitting. Temperatures are expected to drop this week with a couple of promising storms bringing fresh snow our way!  Your days at Solitude just got better with the Solidaze Rewards Challenge — scan your Ikon Pass for prizes and a chance to win a pass for next season.

There is a slight chance of lingering flurries at higher elevations and a touch of drizzle down low this morning. Temperatures will start the day in the mid-30s and rise to the low 40s this afternoon under silvery skies. The springlike weather has left us with variable conditions. The snow may be wet or firm depending on time of day, slope aspect, and elevation. With 70+ open trails, you are sure to find terrain to your taste! More than 30 of our trails are groomed, and they’ve been loads of fun the last couple of days. Honeycomb and Evergreen gates will be open for adventure, conditions permitting. Temperatures are expected to drop this week with a couple of promising storms bringing fresh snow our way!  Your days at Solitude just got better with the Solidaze Rewards Challenge — scan your Ikon Pass for prizes and a chance to win a pass for next season.
